description: A square commemorative graphic in red, white and blue tones. The U.S. Marine Corps eagle-globe-and-anchor emblem and bold text at the top read CELEBRATING 250 YEARS of MARINES. The center is a montage layering a faint American flag, the Iwo Jima flag-raising memorial sculpture, armed service members in tactical gear, a portrait of an early Marine officer in period uniform at the lower left, and a soldier with a rucksack at the lower right. A banner across the bottom carries the U.S. Customs and Border Protection seal and wordmark.
notable_text: CELEBRATING 250 YEARS of MARINES; U.S. Customs and Border Protection
